reviews.comment:
Buena limpieza. Baños excelentes. Desayunos y sándwiches buenos pero muy caros. El combustible carísimo, más caro que cualquier otra estación. Esta vez los baños estaban sucios . La confitería estaba sucia, me hicieron el descuento de socio a regañadientes, los precios caros. Los vidrios muy sucios. Me parece que tienen que mejorar.

(Translated by Google)
Good cleanliness. Excellent restrooms. Good breakfasts and sandwiches, but very expensive. Fuel is extremely expensive, more expensive than any other station. This time the restrooms were dirty. The concession stand was dirty, they reluctantly gave me the member discount, and the prices were high. The windows were very dirty. I think they need to improve.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBdGZ5bTFBRRAB
